title: (Bullish Signal) SAIA, enters Uptrend as Momentum ascends above 0 level on Oct 30, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that SAIA's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron A.I.dvisor backtested 76 similar cases where SAIA's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 63 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $151.88 is above $132.15 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 09/30/20 - 10/30/20, the price experienced a +17% Uptrend. During the week of 10/23/20 - 10/30/20, the stock enjoyed a +0.17% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/15snzvr2svw51.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=8274ee0589631f261d9717e8bf1e576e391e41e9

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

SAIA moved above its 50-day Moving Average on October 02, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for SAIA crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on October 08, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 10 of 15 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 67%.

Following a +4.13% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where SAIA advanced for three days, in 258 of 324 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 216 of 286 cases where SAIA Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 76%.
